_note: FieldSchema (flat — all field-type configs are top-level optional props). Seeded from docs/audits/2026-06-fieldschema-property-liveness.md. ~half dead. Nested config objects (currencyConfig/vectorConfig/fileAttachmentConfig/encryptionConfig/maskingRule/cached/dataQuality) are wholly dead → classified at top level. Naming-drift props are server-live but client-snake. Framework evidence cited with paths; objectui-renderer evidence as prose.

conditionalRequired.note: deprecated alias of requiredWhen — plan removal.

language.note: code field — CodeField.tsx:13 (only language is live; theme/lineNumbers dead).

unique.note: CAVEAT — DDL-only; NOT validated on the write path (violations surface as raw driver errors).

precision.note: CAVEAT — UI display formatting only; DDL never sizes (maps to float). (NumberField.tsx:16).

scale.note: CAVEAT — grid formatting only; DDL never sizes.

reference.note: CAVEAT — $expand/cascade/seed live; FK DDL reads reference_to (unmapped from reference).

autonumberFormat.note: CAVEAT — runtime sequence formatting live; UI AutoNumberField ignores it.

maxLength.note: CAVEAT — server validation honors camelCase, but the client form reads snake_case max_length.

minLength.note: CAVEAT — server camel; client form reads min_length.

referenceFilters.evidence: lookup dialog reads lookup_filters (LookupField.tsx:171) — entirely dead as authored (naming drift)
referenceFilters.authorHint: The lookup dialog reads `lookup_filters`, not `referenceFilters` — as authored this filters nothing. Use the supported lookup-filter key, or remove it to avoid implying a constrained lookup.

maxRating.evidence: RatingField reads `max` (RatingField.tsx:13) — dead + redundant with max
maxRating.authorHint: The rating renderer reads `max`, not `maxRating` — set `max` instead; `maxRating` is ignored.

columnName.evidence: resolveColumnName (spec system-names.ts:182) has ZERO call sites; SQL driver hardcodes column = field key
columnName.note: DANGEROUS — advertises custom physical columns the driver never honors.
columnName.authorHint: The physical column always equals the field key — a custom `columnName` is silently ignored by the driver. Remove it; rename the field key itself if you need a different column.

searchable.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

index.evidence: field-level — driver reads object indexes[] (sql-driver.ts:1252); field bool unused
index.authorHint: A field-level `index: true` creates no index — the driver builds indexes from the object's `indexes[]` array. Declare the index there instead.

externalId.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

currencyConfig.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

vectorConfig.evidence: nested config — renderers read flat dimensions; no consumer, no vector-index DDL
vectorConfig.authorHint: This nested block is not read (no vector-index DDL). Set the flat `dimensions` sibling instead.

fileAttachmentConfig.evidence: nested config — renderers read flat multiple/accept/maxSize (FileField.tsx:16); no size/type/virus enforcement in write path
fileAttachmentConfig.authorHint: This nested block is not read — and note no size/type enforcement happens on write. Use the flat `multiple`/`accept`/`maxSize` siblings for the renderer.

inlineTitle.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

inlineColumns.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

inlineAmountField.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

relatedList.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

relatedListTitle.note: LIVE via objectui renderer — the 2026-06 audit mis-classified as dead (renderer side not re-verified). Corrected after checking ../objectui.

trackHistory.note: ADR-0052 §5b — the audit-writer renders tracked-field diffs as human-readable activity summaries (renderTrackedChangeSummary + getFieldDefs read field.trackHistory). Reintroduces the pruned auditTrail concept WITH a runtime consumer, satisfying enforce-or-remove (ADR-0049).
